description: Destructure an explicitly typed `Observable<T>` param of a standalone function in place. The binding pattern is rebound to a synthetic stream param (keeping the `: Observable<T>` annotation) and each field lifts to `item.field` — the same rebind a component-`.map` item param gets, but gated on the annotation since a named function can be called from anywhere. The field-typed param passed at the call site flows through verbatim, so it composes with the emitted mapToComponents.
